prompts.title: Settings screen — structure and tokens
prompts.prompt:
Redesign settings-screen.tsx based on this spec. Do not change any other files.

STRUCTURE
Replace the current flat list with 4 bridge-section cards in this order:
1. PROFILE — Profile name, Age, Sex, Height, Weight, Body fat, Muscle mass
2. GOALS — Goal, Goal weight, Pace, Activity level, Diet type, Meals per day
3. PREFERENCES — Cuisine focus, Budget, Ingredient exclusions, Measurement system, Language, Appearance
4. ACCOUNT — Clear all data, Reset & start over

Remove the Meal Plan section entirely (Update ingredients and Regenerate plan belong in daily-view, not settings).

HEADER PANEL (above sections)
Eyebrow: PROFILE & PLAN SETTINGS
Headline: Keep your plan aligned
Sub: {goalLabel} · {weeksToGoal} weeks to goal (dynamic)
Two stat chips: DAILY TARGET {calories} kcal / PLAN SETUP {mealsPerDay} meals / day
Card: border-radius 28px, border 1px, shadow, padding 18px

BACK LINK
Top of screen: Back to Plan pill
Style: min-height 44px, border-radius 999px, background #f8f2ea, 14px padding

SECTION STRUCTURE
Each section has:
- Eyebrow: 8×8px dot (color #b77749) + uppercase label, 11px / font-weight 600 / letter-spacing 0.18em
- Eyebrow padding: 24px top, 20px horizontal, 10px bottom
- Bridge-section card: border-radius 24px, margin 0 16px, box-shadow 0 18px 40px -28px rgba(18,33,23,0.38)
- Section footer below card: muted text, padding 10px 20px 0 12px

SECTION FOOTERS (exact copy)
Under PROFILE: Shapes calories, macros, and the meals we build around your week.
Under GOALS: Changes show up the next time you regenerate your plan.
Under PREFERENCES: (none)
Under ACCOUNT: Destructive actions are permanent. "Clear all data" keeps your profile; "Reset" removes it.

ROW STRUCTURE
Each row: min-height 48px, padding 12px 18px, flex row, label left / value right / chevron
Label: 15px / font-weight 500 / letter-spacing -0.01em, Avenir Next font stack
Value: 15px / font-weight 400, muted-foreground color, truncate at 220px
Chevron: omit on destructive rows
Last row in each card omits bottom divider
Destructive row labels use destructive color token (the only red text in the list)

COLOR TOKENS — use CSS variables from globals.css, do not hardcode
Light: --background oklch(0.985 0.008 95) / --card oklch(0.995 0.004 95) / --foreground oklch(0.26 0.024 155) / --muted-foreground oklch(0.54 0.018 155) / --primary oklch(0.58 0.13 151) / --border oklch(0.9 0.008 95) / --destructive oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325)
Dark: --background oklch(0.19 0.012 155) / --card oklch(0.23 0.012 155) / --foreground oklch(0.95 0.008 95) / --muted-foreground oklch(0.72 0.018 135) / --primary oklch(0.72 0.13 151) / --border oklch(0.34 0.012 155)
Extra tokens not in globals (add as inline styles or local vars): primary-soft #edf4ec / destructive-soft #fdecea / rust #b77749 / sand #f8f2ea

TYPOGRAPHY
Font stack: 'Avenir Next', 'Avenir', 'Segoe UI', 'Noto Sans KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', -apple-system, sans-serif
All value displays: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums

prompts.title: Settings screen — inline row expansion
prompts.prompt:
Add inline expansion to settings-screen.tsx. No modals, no bottom sheets. Only one row expanded at a time.

EXPANSION RULES
- Tap row → expands inline, height transition 200ms ease-out
- Tap another row while one is open → collapse current (150ms) then expand new (200ms)
- Chevrons do not rotate
- Expanded row: background #edf4ec, border-top + border-bottom 1px primary, inset shadow inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(72,132,95,0.08)
- Expanded row header: label left (15px/600) + EDITING badge right (primary color)
- All editors: Cancel (outline) + Save (filled primary), 44px height, 16px radius, flex:1, 10px gap between

ROW TYPES

1. SIMPLE TEXT (Profile name, Age, Sex, Body fat, Muscle mass)
Single text or number input field
Input: 48px height, 16px radius, 1px primary border, 18px horizontal padding
Focus ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(72,132,95,0.12)

2. NUMERIC WITH UNIT (Weight, Height, Goal weight)
WEIGHT + HEIGHT: input field + unit chip toggle (kg/lbs or cm/in)
Unit chip: min 56×40px, 14px radius. Active state: primary border + #edf4ec fill
Weight hint: 'Use your current weight or a recent best average. We'll recompute calorie and protein targets.'
GOAL WEIGHT: stepper (−/+), step 0.5kg or 1lb, clamped ±50% of current weight
Stepper buttons: 48×48px, primary color
Stepper value display: 18px/600, tabular-nums, bordered left and right
Live timeline bar: fills proportionally based on current vs goal delta
Goal weight hint: 'At your current pace of −0.5 kg/wk, you'll reach this in ~{N} weeks.'

3. SINGLE-SELECT (Goal, Pace, Activity level, Diet type, Meals per day, Budget, Measurement system, Language)
Expands into vertical list of choice cards (same .settings-choice-card pattern as onboarding)
Selected card: primary border + #edf4ec fill
Tapping a card selects it but does NOT auto-close — user must press Save explicitly

4. MULTI-SELECT (Cuisine focus)
Max 2 selections, min 1
At limit: FIFO swap (new tap replaces oldest selection, no error state)
Tapping the last remaining selected card: ignored
Selection pill right side of each card: 'Included' (active, primary color) / 'Add' (inactive, muted)
Cuisine cards with sub-hints:
  Korean — Rice bowls, banchan, soups
  Mediterranean — Olive oil, grains, legumes
  Japanese — Simple proteins, dashi, rice
  Mexican — Beans, tortillas, fresh salsas
  American — Familiar everyday staples
  Thai — Stir-fries and curries
Bottom hint: 'Pick one or two. Keeps grocery runs realistic and lets flavors repeat across the week.'

5. APPEARANCE (Preferences section)
No expansion. Renders as inline Light / Dark segmented control directly in the row.
Applies theme immediately on tap — no Save button needed.
Persist choice in localStorage.

6. DESTRUCTIVE (Clear all data, Reset & start over)
No chevron. Label in destructive color.
Tap → inline destructive-confirm block expands:
  Background: #fdecea, border 1px destructive (muted)
  Warning glyph: 18×18px circle with exclamation mark, destructive color
  CLEAR ALL DATA: title 'Clear all saved data?' / body 'Removes your meal plan, grocery lists, and ingredient setup. Your profile stays intact so you don't have to redo onboarding.' / confirm button 'Yes, clear data'
  RESET: title 'Reset everything?' / body 'This clears your profile, goals, generated plan, and shopping history from this device. You'll go back to onboarding.' / confirm button 'Yes, start over'
  Buttons: Cancel (outline) + Confirm (filled destructive), 44px, 16px radius, flex:1

prompts.title: selectedDay persist after meal plan regeneration
prompts.prompt:
Fix selectedDay resetting to 0 after meal plan regeneration in daily-view.tsx.

PROBLEM
User is on Thursday (selectedDay=3), triggers regeneration, after completion selectedDay resets to 0 (Monday).

FIX
Before regeneration starts: save current selectedDay to localStorage key 'nutriplan-selected-day'.
After generation completes and component re-renders: restore selectedDay from localStorage.
Alternatively if cleaner: add selectedDay to the Zustand persist config so it survives store updates.
Choose whichever approach fits the existing store structure better.
Do not change any other behavior.
